title: Implement canonical task read path in dashboard
description: Add a read-only dashboard view over Git-backed operations task files so the control plane can begin migrating away from local-only kanban.db state.
handoff_notes: [agent:engineer][task:dashboard-0042] COMPLETED - Canonical task read path is live in the dashboard. The implementation added src/lib/control/tasks.ts, /api/control/tasks, Kanban canonical overlays, and Git/canonical visibility routes. Merged work includes commit 97e53f0 and downstream control-plane follow-ups on main.
